title: Retire Qwen3 cumulative recompute runtime route
created_from: User decision after daily-use observation: segmented route is faster and more usable; cumulative recompute did not solve numeric formatting reliably.

follow_ups.title: Rework numeric-format handling on segmented route
follow_ups.reason: Arabic-number formatting remains unreliable and should be evaluated on long segmented dictation cases instead of cumulative short-case references.
